mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wallet_accounts WHERE owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE wallet_accounts SET available_balance = #{availableBalance}, frozen_balance = #{frozenBalance}, total_income = #{totalIncome}, total_withdrawn = #{totalWithdrawn}, version = COALESCE(version, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
